name: BEN_POP_UP_MESSAGES
description: BEN_POP_UP_MESSAGES identify the messages associated with various steps in specific benefits forms.  . For example, display the message "First Time Enrollee" after the enrollment form has opened for a person who has no previous enrollment results.

columns.Name: POP_UP_MESSAGES_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: POP_NAME
columns.Comments: Pop-up message name.

columns.Name: FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FF_FORMULAS_F.

columns.Name: FUNCTION_NAME
columns.Comments: This character field indicates function name.

columns.Name: BLOCK_NAME
columns.Comments: This character field indicates block name.

columns.Name: FIELD_NAME
columns.Comments: This character field indicates field name.

columns.Name: EVENT_NAME
columns.Comments: This character field indicates event name.

columns.Name: MESSAGE
columns.Comments: This character field indicates message text.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This character field indicates message type.

columns.Name: NO_FORMULA_FLAG
columns.Comments: No Formula Y or N.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: START_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date.

columns.Name: END_DATE
columns.Comments: End date.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: VAL
columns.Comments: Template number field to hold numerical values.

columns.Name: BENEFIT_RELATION_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds benefit relation id.

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds legal entity id.

columns.Name: TEXT
columns.Comments: Template character field to hold text.

columns.Name: CNT_NUM
columns.Comments: Template number field to hold numerical values.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: This field holds error message code.

columns.Name: LER_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds foreign key to BEN_LER_F.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds foreign key to PER_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PGM_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds foreign key to BEN_PGM_F.

columns.Name: PL_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds foreign key to BEN_PL_F.

columns.Name: OIPL_ID
columns.Comments: This field holds foreign key to BEN_OIPL_F.

columns.Name: FUNCTION_ID
columns.Comments: Template ID field to hold ID values.

columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.
